package rulecoverage

func PositiveSprintfForSimpleStringFormat() string {
    ruleID := "sprintf_for_simple_string_format"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", a, b)` where only `%s` verbs are used"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
